channel.title: Discover - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: Trending content from your personal network

item.title: Trump's July 4 celebration featured a massive fireworks disp…
item.author: Newsweek (@newsweek.com)
item.description: Trump's July 4 celebration featured a massive fireworks display that organizers said could break the Guinness World Record.

item.title: New York City’s Summer of Ludd festival is teaching people h…
item.author: WIRED (@wired.com)
item.description: New York City’s Summer of Ludd festival is teaching people how to live offline amid the suffocating presence of Big Tech.

item.title: A Delta Air Lines flight was apparently struck by fireworks …
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: A Delta Air Lines flight was apparently struck by fireworks as it descended into Chicago Midway International Airport on Saturday evening, according to air traffic control audio and the airline. https://cnn.it/4vObfOU
item.content:encoded: A Delta Air Lines flight was apparently struck by fireworks as it descended into Chicago Midway International Airport on Saturday evening, according to air traffic control audio and the airline. https://cnn.it/4vObfOU

item.title: Happy Cirno Sunday! ngl I saw a trailer for a game called Te…
item.author: Chris Monka (@chrismonka.bsky.social)
item.description: Happy Cirno Sunday! ngl I saw a trailer for a game called TeaKnights, and it looks so awesome 🥹 the game is a rhythm game and a rail shooter, and the graphics look really cool! The music was a vibe as well, it looks super fun! I hope you have a wonderful day, I send love and positivity your way 💛☺️
item.content:encoded: Happy Cirno Sunday! ngl I saw a trailer for a game called TeaKnights, and it looks so awesome 🥹 the game is a rhythm game and a rail shooter, and the graphics look really cool! The music was a vibe as well, it looks super fun! I hope you have a wonderful day, I send love and positivity your way 💛☺️

item.title: 7月05日 日曜日☁☂️ 室温27.4℃ １勤目終了なり。。。 あ〜蒸し暑かった〜🫠 汗でビショビショ…🫠 今日も1…
item.author: 菊理（くくり）スランプ脱出中 (@kukuri9901xx.bsky.social)
item.description:
7月05日　日曜日☁☂️
室温27.4℃
１勤目終了なり。。。
あ〜蒸し暑かった〜🫠
汗でビショビショ…🫠
今日も1日お疲れ様ですた🍵
明日も頑張ろう…🫠

もうじき、七夕🎋なのにすっかり忘れてた…😂
今年の七夕イラストは無しです(笑)

今日のイラストは後でアップしますので。
item.content:encoded:
7月05日　日曜日☁☂️
室温27.4℃
１勤目終了なり。。。
あ〜蒸し暑かった〜🫠
汗でビショビショ…🫠
今日も1日お疲れ様ですた🍵
明日も頑張ろう…🫠

もうじき、七夕🎋なのにすっかり忘れてた…😂
今年の七夕イラストは無しです(笑)

今日のイラストは後でアップしますので。

item.title: 【スパーダ】 自作小説に登場する56し屋・縫殿夢丸（ぬいどの ゆめまる）くんのイメージ画です。 目に光を与えないこと…
item.author: 朽木桜斎（くちき おうさい） (@kuchiki-ohsai.bsky.social)
item.description:
【スパーダ】

自作小説に登場する56し屋・縫殿夢丸（ぬいどの　ゆめまる）くんのイメージ画です。

目に光を与えないことで虚無を表現できると山田玲司先生がおっしゃっておりました🤔
item.content:encoded:

自作小説に登場する56し屋・縫殿夢丸（ぬいどの　ゆめまる）くんのイメージ画です。

目に光を与えないことで虚無を表現できると山田玲司先生がおっしゃっておりました🤔

生き物や料理のグッズがいっぱい！ぜひお越しください！

日時 ： 2026/7/5(日) 　11:00～18:00
場所 ： 創世スクエアビル・札幌市民交流プラザ
#ハンドメイド　#イベント　#北海道
item.content:encoded:

生き物や料理のグッズがいっぱい！ぜひお越しください！

日時 ： 2026/7/5(日) 　11:00～18:00
場所 ： 創世スクエアビル・札幌市民交流プラザ

item.title: #🔖テクノロジー コードレビュー指摘300件を3ヶ月分類したら効いていたのは2種類だけだった Bug指摘の欠陥相関0…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖テクノロジー
コードレビュー指摘300件を3ヶ月分類したら効いていたのは2種類だけだった

Bug指摘の欠陥相関0.51は、Style指摘の0.04の約13倍。同じ「1件のレビューコメント」でも、効きめが1桁違う。 「nit:が多いレビューほどコードが歪む」という逆説 集計の途中で、不気味な相関に気づいた。nit: (Style系) が多いPRほど、3ヶ月後の欠陥相関がむしろ高い。Style指摘の自己相関ではなく、他カテゴリの欠陥相...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖テクノロジー
コードレビュー指摘300件を3ヶ月分類したら効いていたのは2種類だけだった

Bug指摘の欠陥相関0.51は、Style指摘の0.04の約13倍。同じ「1件のレビューコメント」でも、効きめが1桁違う。 「nit:が多いレビューほどコードが歪む」という逆説 集計の途中で、不気味な相関に気づいた。nit: (Style系) が多いPRほど、3ヶ月後の欠陥相関がむしろ高い。Style指摘の自己相関ではなく、他カテゴリの欠陥相...

item.title: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: Folarin Balogun will be ava…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: Folarin Balogun will be available to play the USMNT’s round of 16 match against Belgium with his one-game red-card ban suspended. Multiple FIFA officials previously said that a team cannot appeal a red card or suspension. nyti.ms/4vJ2Ls7
item.content:encoded: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: Folarin Balogun will be available to play the USMNT’s round of 16 match against Belgium with his one-game red-card ban suspended. Multiple FIFA officials previously said that a team cannot appeal a red card or suspension. nyti.ms/4vJ2Ls7

item.title: おはようございます！(:D)┓ いつもの都営～ 【六本木駅】都営地下鉄大江戸線12-600形。鉄輪式のリニアモーター地下…
item.author: ヂーゼル機関車《masashi》 (@dieselloco.bsky.social)
item.description:
おはようございます！(:D)┓
いつもの都営～
【六本木駅】都営地下鉄大江戸線12-600形。鉄輪式のリニアモーター地下鉄が、日本の地下鉄最深 地下42.3mの駅に到着！
【笹塚駅】都営地下鉄新宿線10-300形。引上線とのからみで、線路の造形がおもしろい。
【大塚駅前停留場 付近】東京さくらトラム7700形(5月)🌹
【池袋陸橋】りんかい線71-000形(ほぼ都営)
#鉄道 #railway
item.content:encoded:
おはようございます！(:D)┓
いつもの都営～
【六本木駅】都営地下鉄大江戸線12-600形。鉄輪式のリニアモーター地下鉄が、日本の地下鉄最深 地下42.3mの駅に到着！
【笹塚駅】都営地下鉄新宿線10-300形。引上線とのからみで、線路の造形がおもしろい。
【大塚駅前停留場 付近】東京さくらトラム7700形(5月)🌹
【池袋陸橋】りんかい線71-000形(ほぼ都営)
#鉄道 #railway

item.title: A profile of Kaley Glenn-Mills, the plaintiff in K.G.M. v. M…

item.title: When I first read this 30 years ago, it was clearly SciFi. …
item.author: Thiago Carvalho (@cyrilpedia.bsky.social)
item.description:
When I first read this 30 years ago, it was clearly SciFi.

Re-reading it now, it feels like a different genre.
(also, it holds up: Atwood is a great writer)
item.content:encoded:
When I first read this 30 years ago, it was clearly SciFi.

Re-reading it now, it feels like a different genre.
(also, it holds up: Atwood is a great writer)

item.title: I asked a Norwegian fan at the World Cup match how so many o…
item.author: GS (@fundhuman.bsky.social)
item.description:
I asked a Norwegian fan at the World Cup match how so many of their fans can afford to spend the summer in America going to a bunch of expensive
World Cup games, and I shit you not he just goes “Our healthcare and school are free and our work is encouraging us to do so.”

Fuck man.
item.content:encoded:
I asked a Norwegian fan at the World Cup match how so many of their fans can afford to spend the summer in America going to a bunch of expensive
World Cup games, and I shit you not he just goes “Our healthcare and school are free and our work is encouraging us to do so.”

Fuck man.

item.title: I just saw the worst analysis of the handmaid’s tale and I’m…
item.author: ✨Directed by John Carpenter✨ (@ourflagmeansbeth.bsky.social)
item.description:
I just saw the worst analysis of the handmaid’s tale and I’m not gonna drag the person but soooooo many people misinterpret that book.

When Atwood wrote it, she said on numerous occasions she only included things that had already happened in history.

The abuse isn’t novel, it’s where it HAPPENS.
item.content:encoded:
I just saw the worst analysis of the handmaid’s tale and I’m not gonna drag the person but soooooo many people misinterpret that book.

When Atwood wrote it, she said on numerous occasions she only included things that had already happened in history.

The abuse isn’t novel, it’s where it HAPPENS.

item.title: Jimmie “Chris” Duncan was sentenced to death after allegedly…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
Jimmie “Chris” Duncan was sentenced to death after allegedly fabricated bite mark analysis helped convict him of murder. After 28 years in prison, he is officially free.

The Louisiana Supreme Court called the evidence against him "scientifically indefensible."

with @veritenews.org
item.content:encoded:
Jimmie “Chris” Duncan was sentenced to death after allegedly fabricated bite mark analysis helped convict him of murder. After 28 years in prison, he is officially free.

The Louisiana Supreme Court called the evidence against him "scientifically indefensible."

with @veritenews.org

item.title: Gaspésie, Quebec “Recognized by National Geographic Travele…
item.author: 🇨🇦 👊🇨🇦 (@sorry-iamcanadian.bsky.social)
item.description:
Gaspésie, Quebec

“Recognized by National Geographic Traveler as one of Canada’s 50 Places of a Lifetime, …

discover four national parks; famous Percé Rock…moose; summits over 1000 metres (3300 feet); lighthouses; Chaleur Bay…”

www.quebecmaritime.ca/en/discover-...

#Canada
#Quebec

“Recognized by National Geographic Traveler as one of Canada’s 50 Places of a Lifetime, …

discover four national parks; famous Percé Rock…moose; summits over 1000 metres (3300 feet); lighthouses; Chaleur Bay…”

#Quebec

item.title: Polkaisimme Hatanpään Arboretumiin, yhteensä 50 km. Kunnon l…
item.author: Marja-Liisa Manka (@marjaliisamanka.bsky.social)
item.description: Polkaisimme Hatanpään Arboretumiin, yhteensä 50 km. Kunnon lisäksi silmätkin saivat mielenruokaa ruusuista. Eipä tarvinnut ostaa kotiin 51. hääpäivämme kunniaksi. Nautimme hyvät kahvitkin, toinen makealla ja toinen suolaisella lisällä. Sade pysyi loitolla melkein kotiin asti. @jussima.bsky.social
item.content:encoded: Polkaisimme Hatanpään Arboretumiin, yhteensä 50 km. Kunnon lisäksi silmätkin saivat mielenruokaa ruusuista. Eipä tarvinnut ostaa kotiin 51. hääpäivämme kunniaksi. Nautimme hyvät kahvitkin, toinen makealla ja toinen suolaisella lisällä. Sade pysyi loitolla melkein kotiin asti. @jussima.bsky.social

item.title: 🇧🇷Dragão 🌎Pseudoleistes virescens Conservação: Pouco Preo…
item.author: Aves do Brasil (@avesbrasil.bsky.social)
item.description:
🇧🇷Dragão
🌎Pseudoleistes virescens
Conservação: Pouco Preocupante

O dragão é uma ave passeriforme da família Icteridae.

📷 Alexandre Gualhanone
item.content:encoded:
🇧🇷Dragão
🌎Pseudoleistes virescens
Conservação: Pouco Preocupante

O dragão é uma ave passeriforme da família Icteridae.

📷 Alexandre Gualhanone
